name: ttc
description: TUI automation for AI agents - interact with REPLs, interactive installers, and TUI applications

interface.shortDescription: Operate REPLs, installers, and TUI apps from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use ttc to start an interactive terminal program in a PTY, observe clean screen snapshots, send keystrokes, and clean up the session when finished.
defaultPrompt: Use ttc to interact with an interactive installer.
Use ttc to drive a REPL and inspect the terminal snapshot.
Use ttc to navigate a TUI program.
